hero.headline: Pool pump died? *We've got one in stock*
hero.subheadline: Same-day repairs, same-day installs — because summer doesn't wait

services_section.label: POOL FIXES
services_section.heading: Pumps, repairs, and upgrades
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to routine maintenance — one call handles it

services.title: Pool Pump Replacement
services.description: Motor died? We stock the pumps you need and install them the same day you call.

services.title: Equipment Repair
services.description: Filters, heaters, and automation systems — we fix what's broken and upgrade what's not.

services.title: Pool Maintenance
services.description: Weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment checks to keep everything running smooth.

services.title: System Troubleshooting
services.description: When your pool tech can't figure it out, we show up with the answers and the parts.

about.heading: Columbia's pool problem solvers
about.body: We're the team that shows up on time with the right parts. No waiting, no runaround — just fast fixes that work.

reviews.name: Denise C.
reviews.text: Communication was efficient and timely. They gave me a day and time for repair and were right on time. Emailed my bill so I didn't have to wait around.

reviews.name: Judith B.
reviews.text: Asked about a new motor for my pool. Very helpful, had it in stock, and someone replaced it that same day. Very pleased.

reviews.name: Pamela B.
reviews.text: Nathan installed a new pool pump — very professional and knowledgeable. Hauled away all debris and took the old pump. Price was very affordable.

service_areas.label: SERVICE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving the Columbia area
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times across the Midlands

cta.heading: Ready to fix your pool problem?
cta.body: Call now for same-day service or get your free estimate online. We answer the phone and show up when we say we will.
